Landing.badge: Built for licensed lawyers across Egypt
Landing.heroTitle: Fast legal support by court and city.
Landing.heroLead: A trusted network where verified lawyers post requests, get rapid responses from the right city, and coordinate directly through WhatsApp.
Landing.how1Desc: Select the court, add your request details, and attach documents when needed.
Landing.how2Desc: Only verified lawyers active in the same city receive an instant push notification.
Landing.how3Desc: Review responses, choose the right lawyer, and continue quickly through WhatsApp.
Landing.trust1: Registration is restricted to licensed lawyers.
Landing.trust2: Each account is manually reviewed before activation.
Landing.trust3: Profiles include syndicate card number and city activity.
Landing.trust4: Admin tools support moderation and account suspension when required.
Landing.useCase1: A lawyer needs urgent help at Cairo North Court.
Landing.useCase2: He posts a request with court and details from the mobile app.
Landing.useCase3: Lawyers active in Cairo receive city-based notifications.
Landing.useCase4: Interested lawyers respond with messages and optional documents.
Landing.useCase5: The requester opens responder profiles and contacts the best match on WhatsApp.
Landing.ctaTitle: Be Part of Egypt's Trusted Legal Collaboration Layer
Landing.ctaLead: Join the early lawyer network and help shape how legal assistance is coordinated across courts and cities.
Landing.footerMvp: For licensed lawyers only. MVP version.
